revision: v1.1 — rebound corpus SHA 07e99a3 -> 372a659 (live foundation tip: two-period-travel + WTA_CHALL-fix corpus) and reconciled tier scope to 3 solid cats (WTA_CHALL deferred). Thresholds unchanged from v1; this is a binding+scope reconciliation, not a goalpost move.
purpose: Pre-registered thresholds for the range-stack banding null-validation. Committed BEFORE the permutation run so neither reviewer can move goalposts post-hoc. Same pre-registration discipline as the exit gate.

corpus_binding.rebind_reason: Bumped to the live foundation tip the run actually executes against — the two-period-travel on T-4h-vicinity OPEN anchor (per-cell sand-pooled) plus the WTA_CHALL BetExplorer fix. Ensures the null's mid-heavy marginal density and the run corpus are the SAME SHA.
corpus_binding.note: Corpus and density-marginal must be derived from this exact SHA. open_anchor definition must match the SHA's locked foundation measurement: verified T-4h-vicinity Kalshi-open (closest traded print to T-240 within [180,300] min), NOT running-mid, NOT first-ever print.

WTA_CHALL.reason: FV source wired (BetExplorer challenger-women-singles registered, commit a4659b2) but coverage is 3/7 and forward-only; historical gap before the fix remains open. Insufficient corpus to band — cannot run the null honestly yet.
WTA_CHALL.revisit_condition: Re-include once WTA_CHALL FV coverage backfills to a corpus depth comparable to ATP_CHALL; will require its own re-freeze with WTA_CHALL added to tiers.

scope.scope_note: 3 solid cats per the live foundation. WTA_CHALL is an explicit logged deferral, NOT a silent drop. FDR multiplicity scope adjusts to 3 tiers x 2 objects accordingly.

range_objects.advancement_note: A band must clear the null in BOTH range-objects after FDR to advance. A-only = untradeable post-T-20 convergence; B-only = pre-T-20 transient.

null_model.marginal_density_note: Mid-heavy (peak c55-64, mid 46-49% mass, extreme 8-11%). NOT GWU all-markets bimodal. Null is built on THIS measured marginal so mid-bands face a high bar and extreme-bands a low bar.
null_model.flb_baked_note: Preserving drift sign embeds the favorite-longshot gradient INTO the null; bands beating this null are residual-to-FLB by construction. Explicit FLB regression in section 5 is confirmatory.

flat_leg_handling.definition: abs(end - open_anchor) <= tau_flat_cents treated as directionless

ipw_selection_correction.rationale: Survivorship deficit is directional (~2x extreme underrepresentation) and pushes same direction as mid-density artifact; survivor-raw would double-inflate mid bands.

band_threshold.stage_1_note: Per-cell empirical percentile auto-scales the bar to mid-heavy density.

held_out_validation.rationale: Same standard as exit gate; intra-session outcome correlation makes plain time-split leak.

final_advancement_rule: A band advances to band-config ONLY if: (1) significant in A_INTERSECT_B after FDR q=0.05, (2) IPW-corrected (not survivor-raw), (3) held-out realized sign stable across CPCV, (4) FLB-residual non-trivial.
goalpost_lock: All thresholds in this file are frozen at the committed git_sha. No parameter may be re-chosen after band results are observed. Covariate tier and flat-leg gating branch are logged at run start and locked.
superseded_note: Halted on the net-displacement flat gate (~40% net-flat open->T-20). That was a dimensional category error: a resting maker bid is path-triggered (fills on excursion/reach), not endpoint-triggered. Replaced by range_stack_dimensional_v2 which makes fill-reach-at-depth the primary instrument and harvest-vs-drift the headline gate. Thresholds in this file remain valid for the net-displacement null but that instrument is no longer the entry test.
